name: GPT-4o
description: OpenAI's flagship multimodal model with native text, vision, and audio capabilities, offering strong all-around performance.

name: GPT-4o Mini
description: Cost-efficient small model replacing GPT-3.5 Turbo, offering strong performance at a fraction of GPT-4o's cost.

name: GPT-4 Turbo
description: Enhanced GPT-4 with vision support, JSON mode, and a 128K context window at reduced pricing versus original GPT-4.

name: o1
description: OpenAI's first reasoning model that uses chain-of-thought to solve complex math, science, and coding problems.

name: o3
description: Advanced reasoning model succeeding o1, with significantly improved math and coding performance at reduced pricing.

name: o3-mini
description: Cost-efficient reasoning model with adjustable effort levels (low/medium/high), matching o1 at medium on STEM tasks.

name: Claude 3.5 Sonnet
description: Anthropic's breakout model that surpassed GPT-4o on most benchmarks at half the cost, excelling at coding and reasoning.

name: Claude 3.5 Sonnet (Oct 2024)
description: Updated Sonnet with computer use capability and improved coding (93.7% HumanEval), the most popular coding model of late 2024.

name: Claude 3 Opus
description: Anthropic's original flagship model, excelling at complex analysis and nuanced writing with strong safety alignment.

name: Claude 3 Haiku
description: Anthropic's fastest and most affordable model, designed for near-instant responses on simple queries and classification.

name: Claude Opus 4
description: Anthropic's first Opus 4 generation model with extended thinking capabilities and strong agentic coding performance.

name: Claude Sonnet 4
description: Balanced mid-tier model in the Claude 4 generation, offering strong coding and reasoning at competitive pricing.

name: Claude Opus 4.5
description: Major upgrade with 87% GPQA and 80.9% SWE-bench, the highest-rated Anthropic model before the 4.6 generation.

name: Claude Opus 4.6
description: Current #1 on Chatbot Arena (1496 ELO), with 99.8% AIME 2025 and 80.8% SWE-bench, leading in coding and hard prompts.

name: Gemini 1.5 Pro
description: Google's first million-token context model (up to 2M), excelling at long-document understanding and multimodal tasks.

name: Gemini 2.0 Flash
description: Ultra-fast and affordable multimodal model with native tool use, image/audio generation, and 1M token context.

name: Gemini 2.5 Pro
description: Google's hybrid thinking model combining fast responses with deep reasoning, top performer on coding and math benchmarks.

name: Gemini 2.5 Flash
description: Fast reasoning model with excellent cost efficiency, balancing speed and intelligence for high-throughput applications.

name: Gemini 3 Pro
description: Google's latest flagship with 94.3% GPQA and 100% AIME 2025, #2 on Chatbot Arena behind Claude Opus 4.6.

name: Llama 3.1 405B
description: Largest open-source model at release, competitive with GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet across most benchmarks.

name: Llama 3.1 70B
description: Strong mid-size open-source model offering excellent performance-to-cost ratio for self-hosted deployments.

name: Llama 3.1 8B
description: Compact open-source model suitable for on-device and edge deployments with surprisingly strong capabilities for its size.

name: Mistral Large 2
description: Mistral's flagship with 123B parameters, multilingual in 80+ languages, and strong code generation (92% HumanEval).

name: Mixtral 8x22B
description: Sparse MoE model using 39B of 141B parameters, Apache 2.0 licensed, excellent efficiency-to-performance ratio.

name: DeepSeek V3
description: Chinese open-source MoE model rivaling GPT-4o at a fraction of the cost, trained for under $6M causing industry shock.

name: DeepSeek R1
description: Open-source reasoning model matching o1 performance with 97.3% MATH-500, disrupted the AI industry with its efficiency.

name: Grok-2
description: xAI's second-gen model with real-time X/Twitter data access, competitive with GPT-4o on standard benchmarks.

name: Grok-3
description: Trained on xAI's Colossus supercluster, top-tier math reasoning with 93.3% AIME 2025 score.

name: Command R+
description: Enterprise-focused RAG-optimized model excelling at multi-step tool use, long document analysis, and multilingual tasks.

name: Qwen 2.5 72B Instruct
description: Alibaba's leading open-source model with strong multilingual and coding capabilities, competitive with Llama 3.1 70B.

name: GPT-4.5 Preview
description: OpenAI's largest and most knowledgeable non-reasoning model with broad world knowledge and reduced hallucinations.

name: Claude Haiku 4.5
description: Anthropic's fastest model in the 4.5 generation, offering near-Sonnet quality at Haiku-tier speed and pricing.

name: Claude Sonnet 4.6
description: Latest Sonnet with adaptive reasoning, 89.9% GPQA and 79.6% SWE-bench, excellent balance of speed and intelligence.

name: Mistral Large 3
description: Mistral's latest flagship competitive with frontier models, strong multilingual support and function calling.

name: Kimi K2.5
description: Chinese model with the highest HumanEval score ever recorded (99.0%), excelling at code generation and reasoning.

name: GPT-5.2
description: OpenAI's current-gen flagship with 400K context, 92.4% GPQA and 100% AIME 2025, strong reasoning at reduced cost.
